name: Redbubble Limited
summary: Redbubble Limited operates as an online marketplace that facilitates the sale and purchase of art and designs on a range of products between independent creatives and consumers. The company provides sale, marketing, and distribution services to facilitate the sale of goods from artists to those who want to purchase goods bearing the artists' designs. It enables 700,000 independent artists and designers to sell their creations. The company offers its services through its website at Redbubble.com, TeePublic.com, and three foreign language sites in Australia, the United States, the United Kingdom, and internationally. Redbubble Limited was founded in 2006 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.
